sites.name: GitHub
sites.message: Check out my work on GitHub

projects.name: HTTP Access
projects.desc: A simple and accessible app for testing basic HTTP requests. I created this out of a need for a way to test external APIs and my own servers while tools like Postman are not friendly to screen reader software.

projects.name: Remote Cat Therapy
projects.desc: A site where the user can view thousands of cat images, provide a username, and add images to a list of favorites for later viewing.

projects.name: Space Station Tracker
projects.desc: This app chains API calls to get the coordinates of the International Space Station and, via the use of reverse geocoding, reports over which country (if any) the ISS is currently.
